flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northampton County Area Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northampton County Area Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($9.2k → $10.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northampton County Area Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northampton County Area Community College rose 42% between 2006 and 2009 (7.7k → 10.9k).
